title: pteris glandulosa
intro: Pteris glandulosa, also known as the glandular brake fern, is a type of fern native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pteris glandulosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Pteris glandulosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in a topical application for its antiseptic properties.
